title: Cyrtochilum pastorellii
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum pastorellii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Americas. Cyrtochilum pastorellii is classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification is further divided into the tribe Cylindrieae. Cyrtochilum pastorellii is also a member of the genus Cyrtochilum, which consists of approximately 500 species of orchids.
